```python
import pytest

def test_reverse_words_happy_path():
    """Test the happy path with a normal string containing multiple words."""
    assert reverse_words("hello world") == "world hello"
    assert reverse_words("the quick brown fox") == "fox brown quick the"

def test_reverse_words_single_word():
    """Test with a single word."""
    assert reverse_words("hello") == "hello"

def test_reverse_words_empty_string():
    """Test with an empty string."""
    assert reverse_words("") == ""

def test_reverse_words_only_whitespace():
    """Test with a string containing only whitespace (leading, trailing, multiple)."""
    assert reverse_words("   ") == ""
    assert reverse_words(" \t \n ") == ""

def test_reverse_words_leading_trailing_spaces():
    """Test with leading and trailing spaces."""
    assert reverse_words(" hello world ") == "world hello"
    assert reverse_words("  the quick  fox  ") == "fox quick the"

def test_reverse_words_multiple_spaces_between_words():
    """Test with multiple spaces between words."""
    assert reverse_words("hello   world") == "world hello"
    assert reverse_words("a  b   c") == "c b a"

def test_reverse_words_non_string_input():
    """Test error case: non-string input should raise AttributeError."""
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        reverse_words(None)
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        reverse_words(123)
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        reverse_words([1, 2, 3])
```
